title: User Consumer
description: Consume a value from a Context using the useContext hook.
problemStatement:
Grab the data! In a child component, use the `useContext` hook to access the current value of `ThemeContext` and display it in a `<div>`.

**Requirement:** Import `useContext` and the context object you created.
hints: `useContext` is the simplest way to read context values in functional components.
